name: Aminophylline

preparations.label: Standard Preparation
preparationSteps: Dilute 250 mg in 50 mls syringe with Normal saline
preparations.notes: Loading dose: 5mg/kg in 100mls NS over 1/2 Hour (Run over 20-30 mins)

administrationGuidance: Loading dose: 5mg/kg. DO NOT give bolus to patients already on oral theophylline/NEULIN. Maintenance Dose target depends on profile: Non-smoker: 0.5mg/kg/hr. Smoker: 0.8mg/kg/hr. Elderly: 0.3mg/kg/hr. Adjust doseMin/doseMax in calculator based on patient profile.
importantCautions: Do not give bolus to patients already on oral theophylline
Different maintenance rates for smokers, non-smokers, and elderly
references: Hospital Sultanah Aminah Guidelines For Drug Reconstitution 2013
